$description: discokit design tokens — the ONE palette (W3C DTCG). Source of truth for tokens.py (Discord embed ints) and tokens.css (HTML→PNG cards). Regenerate both with: python3 ops/discokit/build_tokens.py

status.$description: Six semantic states. Colours are Primer dark-mode hexes (WCAG 4.5:1 on Discord's near-black, warn/crit separated on brightness). The glyph carries meaning by shape so it survives with no colour vision.

accent.$description: Non-status identity hues for embeds that aren't a health state — a spotlight, a merged PR, a mid-tier disruption. Use a status colour when the meaning IS a status.
